== Notes for [[Item:Q82171|Q82171]] ==

ID: I84730

Name: Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus

Given Name: Servius Cornelius Scipio

Surname: Salvidienus

Sex: M

_UID: 319A91D2584AF54D91F885D4DDBA4614E517

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: Servius Cornelius Salvidienus

Marriage 1 Calpurnia Pisa b: ABT 106

Married:

Children

Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus b: ABT 123

Cornelia Salvidienus b: ABT 137

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84730
--------------------
ID: I84710

Name: Servius Cornelius Servius Lentulus

Given Name: Servius Cornelius Servius

Surname: Lentulus

Sex: M

_UID: C45C3E4883FC954A9D8913DE49EA7616DA67

Change Date: 11 Aug 2005

Birth: ABT 10 BC

Death: AFT 40

Father: Servius Cornelius Gnaeus Lentulus b: ABT 30 BC

Marriage 1 Munantia Plancina b: ABT 10 BC

Married:

Children

Cornelia Cethegilla

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84710

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
